overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a sci-fi RPG showing a character in futuristic armor exploring a dimly lit cyberpunk-style cantina with red and green neon lighting. The character walks through the industrial bar interior, passing tables, NPCs, and a large yellow cylindrical tank before reaching a staircase.

segments.scene_description: The character walks through the main floor of a sci-fi cantina, passing a curved metal bar counter with neon lighting on the right. The space features futuristic tables and a large viewport window at the far end showing an exterior space scene.

segments.scene_description: The character reaches the back wall featuring a large viewport window overlooking space, pauses briefly, then turns to walk through a side passage with red illuminated tables and visible industrial piping overhead.

segments.scene_description: The character enters a utility corner featuring a prominent yellow cylindrical tank and a metal staircase with red lighting. An armored NPC approaches from the left as the character stops near the stairs, with graffiti visible on the walls.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-lit sci-fi cantina that shifts from an open social hub into a cramped industrial utility area. It begins on the main floor, gliding past a curved metal bar counter and futuristic tables toward a large viewport window revealing the void of space. As the character pauses at the window, the camera pivots into a narrow side passage characterized by red illuminated tables and exposed overhead piping. The scene then opens into a utility corner dominated by a large yellow cylindrical tank and graffiti-covered walls before finally coming to a halt near a red-lit metal staircase as an armored NPC approaches from the left.
